channel.title: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations
channel.description: The Rest of the Record feed: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 35-54 83 STREET, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 27-2007, 27-2041.1 HMC, §238, § 309; § 107 (2) ( C) MDL AND 28 RCNY §25-171: REPLACE OR REPAIR THE SELF-CLOSING DOORS THAT IS MISSING OR DEFECTIVE LATCH SET AT LAUNDRY ROOM ENTRANCE DOOR AT CELLAR

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 777 GLENMORE AVENUE, Apt 702, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
HMC ADM CODE: § 27-2017.4 ABATE THE INFESTATION CONSISTING OF ROACHES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 702, 7th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST , SECTION AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 146 BEACH 59 STREET, Apt 706, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2043.1 HMC INSTALL THE MISSING OR REPAIR/REPLACE THE DEFECTIVE WINDOW GUARD(S) IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE SPECIFICATIONS OF THE NEW YORK CITY HEALTH CODE SECTION 24 RCNY CHAPTER 12. WG TO INSTALL = 2; WG TO REPLACE = 0; WG TO REPAIR = 0; IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 706, 7th STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2008 HUGHES AVENUE, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2008 HUGHES AVENUE, Apt 1C, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open

item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.7, 27-2056.8, 27-2056.9 ADM CODE -CERTIFY COMPLIANCE WITH LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD CONTROL REQUIREMENTS DURING PERIOD OF UNIT VACANCY BY PERFORMING ACTIVITIES NECESSARY TO ABATE TESTED LEAD-BASED PAINT FROM REQUIRED WINDOW AND/OR DOOR FRICTION SURFACES FOR APARTMENT AND MAKE FLOORS SMOOTH AND CLEANABLE, POSITIVE LEAD-BASED PAINT IN AN APARTMENT WITH A CHILD UNDER SIX LOCATED AT APT 3I, 4t

item.description:

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 765 LINCOLN AVENUE, Apt 3S, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... IN THE CLOSET IN THE PRIVATE HALLWAY LOCATED AT APT 3S, 3rd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST ORIGINAL VIOLATION 18557477 ISSUED 06-JAN-26 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1318 STRATFORD AVENUE, Apt 1A, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.4 ADM CODE- CORRECT FAILURE TO NOTIFY OCCUPANTS AND/OR TO INVESTIGATE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARDS.

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1318 STRATFORD AVENUE, Apt 1A, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.7 ADM CODE: CORRECT FAILURE TO PROVIDE TO THE DEPARTMENT WITHIN 45 DAYS OF DEMAND ALL RECORDS REQUIRED TO BE MAINTAINED BY OWNER PURSUANT TO LOCAL LAW 1 OF 2004 RELATED TO LEAD-BASED PAINT NOTICES, INSPECTIONS AND REMEDIATION/ABATEMENT ACTIVITIES.

item.description:
Outcome: Open
